# DP-700 Mock Exam Sources

> **No fabricated questions.** This file only lists Microsoft-published assessment material and sibling study content that is explicitly labeled as unofficial. Do not add generated or scraped questions. Per `../../docs/REUSE_POLICY.md`, any question reused from the sibling `practice-exam.md` must be traceable to a primary source; if you cannot verify it, omit it.

## Official Microsoft sources (use these first)

1. **Microsoft Learn practice assessment for DP-700** — free, unlimited attempts, reflects current exam blueprint.
   - https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/exams/dp-700/practice/assessment
2. **DP-700 exam page** (booking, score report, renewal rules).
   - https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/exams/dp-700/
3. **DP-700 Study Guide** (skills measured — the definitive scope document).
   - https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/resources/study-guides/dp-700
4. **Microsoft Certified: Fabric Data Engineer Associate** — certification landing page, prerequisites, renewal.
   - https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/fabric-data-engineer-associate/
5. **Microsoft Learn — DP-700 learning paths** (free hands-on with Fabric trial capacity).
   - https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/courses/dp-700t00
6. **Microsoft Q&A — `dp-700` tag** — Microsoft-moderated community answers.
   - https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/answers/tags/597/dp-700

## Sibling practice material (format reference only)

- [Microsoft DP-700 practice assessment](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/fabric-data-engineer-associate/)
  - **Status:** Use the official Microsoft Learn practice assessment (listed above in section 1) as the authoritative practice source. For question *format* examples (stems, multi-select patterns, case studies), refer to the [exam formats and question types](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/certification-exams) page.
- [DP-700 Study Guide](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/resources/study-guides/dp-700)
  - Concept-level review aligned to exam domains. Use for spaced recall alongside per-module `quiz.md` files.

## Prohibited sources

- Third-party braindump sites, "exam collector" PDFs, ExamTopics, Udemy test banks — **banned**. They violate Microsoft's exam policy and risk certification revocation.
- Blog posts claiming "real exam questions" — **banned** per `../../docs/REUSE_POLICY.md`.
- LLM-generated question banks — **banned** unless every item is individually verified against Microsoft Learn.

## Recommended practice workflow

1. Complete the official Microsoft Learn practice assessment twice: once blind after finishing modules 00–06, and once the week before your exam slot.
2. For every missed item, open the Microsoft Learn doc cited in the explanation and re-read the relevant section; add a personal flashcard based on the concept tested.
3. Use the per-module `quiz.md` files (each 8–10 MCQs with primary-source citations) as topic-specific drill.
4. Book the exam only when you consistently score 80%+ on the Microsoft Learn practice assessment.
